summary: In this workflow the project_json op name must stay consistent with the task-derived custom-op identity. A different internal class name can make autogen/op_proto.h and the handwritten host registration both define the same op class, leading to class redefinition failures.

After simplifying a kernel interface, re-check every function signature and call site. Leaving a stale argument in the Init declaration caused a duplicate GM_ADDR parameter and blocked kernel compilation even though the overall design was already correct.
